# `government` — government templates

**Industry:** Cross-industry  ·  **Templates:** 4

Phishing templates impersonating government agencies and regulatory bodies

Phishing-simulation templates for **authorized** security awareness training with [GoPhish](https://getgophish.com/) and [HailBytes SAT](https://hailbytes.com/sat?utm_source=github&utm_medium=folder_readme&utm_campaign=gophish-training-templates). See the [repository README](../README.md) for setup and the [full template catalog](../docs/CATALOG.md) for every category at a glance.

## Templates

| Template | File | Attack vector | Difficulty | Est. click rate |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Better Business Bureau Complaint | [`better_business.html`](better_business.html) | credential_harvest | intermediate | 30-50% |

## Template details

### Better Business Bureau Complaint

- **File:** [`better_business.html`](better_business.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/government_education.html`](education/government_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - BBB: Complaint filed against your organization
  - Better Business Bureau: Response required within 14 days
  - Formal complaint received — your response is needed
- **Operator notes:** Best for managers and business owners. Complaint + regulatory authority is a powerful combination.

### FBI/Law Enforcement Crime Report

- **File:** [`crime_report.html`](crime_report.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 30-50%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/government_education.html`](education/government_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - Your information is referenced in an active investigation
  - Law Enforcement: Document request regarding your account
  - FBI IC3: Cybercrime report filed using your information
- **Operator notes:** High-anxiety authority lure invoking law enforcement. Powerful, but use with care — the fear factor can cause undue stress, so favor it for mature programs with strong follow-up education. Most credible when the sender domain mimics a known agency.

### FDIC Banking Survey

- **File:** [`fdic_survey.html`](fdic_survey.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 25-45%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.LastName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/government_education.html`](education/government_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - FDIC: Required banking survey — response mandatory
  - Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation: Customer verification
  - FDIC Compliance: Complete your required annual verification
- **Operator notes:** Authority-and-compliance lure aimed at banking and finance staff; the 'mandatory survey' framing leverages regulatory pressure. The lower click rate reflects its narrower, more skeptical audience — pair it with finance-specific training.

### IRS Tax Refund Notification

- **File:** [`irs_tax_refund.html`](irs_tax_refund.html)
- **Attack vector:** credential_harvest · **Difficulty:** intermediate · **Est. click rate:** 35-55%
- **GoPhish variables:** `{{.FirstName}}` `{{.Email}}` `{{.URL}}` `{{.Tracker}}` `{{.Date}}`
- **Paired training page:** [`education/government_education.html`](education/government_education.html)
- **Suggested subject lines:**
  - IRS: Internal Revenue Service — Electronic Refund Notification
  - IRS Refund: Tax refund balance update for {{.Email}}
  - IRS Tax Notice: Review tax refund status on your account
- **Operator notes:** Extremely effective during Q1 and Q2 tax season. The promise of an unexpected refund is a high-motivation trigger.

## How to use

1. In GoPhish, go to **Email Templates → New Template** and paste the HTML from the file above. Set a subject line from the suggestions.
2. Create a **Landing Page** (see [`../landing-pages/`](../landing-pages/)) to capture the click, and — where a training page is listed — redirect clickers to it so they get immediate education.
3. Configure a realistic **Sending Profile** and launch to a consented, in-scope group. Schedule during business hours for realism.

> **Before sending:** customize sender names, domains, logos, and any brand impersonations to match your engagement and your authorization scope. These templates are for authorized training only.
